name: Vitally
description: Monitor Vitally customer success platform for account access and customer data compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Vitally
2. Go to Settings → Integrations → REST API
3. Copy your Secret Key
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: Secret Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Vitally Settings → Integrations → REST API
